should_trigger: Create a PATCH.md that documents these code changes and verification steps
Update PATCH.md so another agent can reproduce this fix
should_not_trigger: Audit an AUR PKGBUILD before publishing
Break down how database indexes work using questions
Search previous troubleshooting notes for a repeated bug

ambiguous.prompt: A failed skill invocation needs an improvement package with PATCH.md and a memory note
ambiguous.decision: Use patch-md for the reproducible patch artifact; use learnings only for the durable troubleshooting/memory note portion.
ambiguous.reason: The requested artifact explicitly names PATCH.md but also references memory capture.

notes: PATCH.md creation, updates, and application should route here even when another domain skill supplies context.
